name: Fried Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons of margarine in a skillet. Scramble the eggs.
2. Add shredded carrots, cabbage, onion, and scallion to the skillet with the scrambled eggs.
3. Open 2 packages of Ramen noodle seasoning packets and mix them with the vegetables.
4. Cook for 10 minutes until everything is well combined.
5. Prepare the remaining 4 packages of noodles according to package instructions, subtracting 5 minutes from the cooking time.
6. Drain the cooked noodles and add them to the skillet with the vegetable mixture.
7. Add 1 more package of noodle seasoning and mix thoroughly.
8. Serves 6.
